build.//: trunk builds the Leptos SPA to ../dist; the shell serves it as frontendDist.

security.//: The card iframe gets a unique opaque origin via sandbox=allow-scripts (no allow-same-origin) at the element level; this CSP is the host-page policy. frame-src 'self' data: lets srcdoc frames load.
security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; frame-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
